mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_BANNED_NICKNAME WHERE (match_type_cd = 'E' AND banned_word = #{nickname}) OR (match_type_cd = 'C' AND INSTR(#{nickname}, banned_word) > 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_LOGIN_HIST ( member_no, email, reg_login_typ_cd, login_rslt_cd, fail_rsn_cd, login_ip, session_id, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{memberNo, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{email}, #{regLoginTypCd}, #{loginRsltCd}, #{failRsnCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
